Situated in Antigua Guatemala and with Santa Catalina Arch reachable within 400 metres, Ojala offers a tour desk, rooms, a bar, free WiFi throughout the property and two gardens. Boasting luggage storage space, this property also provides guests with a terrace. The accommodation features evening entertainment and a 24-hour front desk.

Hobbitenango is 8 km from Ojala, while Cerro de la Cruz is 2.6 km from the property. The nearest airport is La Aurora, 23 km from the accommodation, and the property offers a paid airport shuttle service.

hotels.description_en:
Comfortable Accommodations: Cissus Hotel Boutique in Antigua Guatemala offers family rooms with private bathrooms, balconies, and kitchen facilities. Each unit includes a terrace, wardrobe, and free WiFi.
Exceptional Facilities: Guests can relax on the sun terrace or in the garden. The aparthotel features a coffee shop, outdoor seating area, and a tour desk. Additional amenities include a minibar, fireplace, and parquet floors.
Convenient Location: Located 39 km from La Aurora Airport, the property is a short walk from Santa Catalina Arch and near attractions such as Hobbitenango and Cerro de la Cruz. Highly rated for its attentive staff and excellent service.

hotels.description_en:
Located in a walking distance from Antigua Guatemala Central Park and 30 metres from The Arch of Santa Catalina, San Rafael Hotel is housed in a colonial-style building. It features free WiFi access and a courtyard with a fountain and a garden.
The comfortable and elegant rooms have wooden furniture, a fireplace and a small seating area. The private bathrooms come with a shower, a hairdryer and free toiletries. A safe is also available.
At San Rafael Hotel guests will have the assistance of the front desk staff 24 hours a day, plus information regarding tour trips and interesting sightseeing will be provided. Massage services are available for a fee.
San Rafael Hotel offers cooking and dancing lessons, plus the services of a professional chef are offered on site.
